meta.description: Master database for the Salah learning module. global_dictionary holds every unique Arabic word keyed by ID. Sections reference those keys — so the same word is stored once and shared across all modules (salah, ablution, quran). Edit one entry and it updates everywhere.

developer.name: Nawavazhi
developer.mission: Nawavazhi (നവവഴി — New Path) is a mission of building practical tools — engineering software, apps, games, learning platforms, and utilities — that the developer uses daily and shares freely so others can benefit. This Salah guide is one such tool.

translation_sources.quran_english: Saheeh International / Hilali & Khan — via quran.com and corpus.quran.com
translation_sources.quran_malayalam: Abdul Hameed Madani & Parappur / Karakunnu & Elayavur — verify via quranwbw.com (set language to Malayalam)
translation_sources.prayer_duas_english: Authenticated Hadith narrations from Sahih Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, Abu Dawud, Tirmidhi — via sunnah.com
translation_sources.prayer_duas_malayalam: Verify against IPH (Islamic Publishing House, Kozhikode), SAMASTHA publications, or Niche of Truth (Satyamarga) materials
translation_sources.arabic_text: Uthmani Quran script — King Fahd Complex standard (Medina Mushaf). Hadith text from authenticated collections.

translation_audit_status.arabic: verified — matches Medina Mushaf and authenticated Hadith text
translation_audit_status.english_quran: verified — consistent with major English translations
translation_audit_status.english_duas: verified — consistent with authenticated Hadith English translations
translation_audit_status.malayalam_quran: largely verified — standard Kerala Islamic vocabulary; cross-check Quranic words at quranwbw.com
translation_audit_status.malayalam_duas: needs_review — follows common Kerala Islamic usage but should be reviewed by a Kerala Islamic scholar before wide publication
translation_audit_status.notes: Malayalam word-level translations for non-Quranic prayers (Sana, Wajjahtu, Tashahhud, Durood, etc.) should be verified against IPH or SAMASTHA publications. Quranic Surahs should be verified word-by-word at quranwbw.com with language set to Malayalam.

lillahi_rabbil.en: are for Allah, Lord of the worlds

wa_bidhalika_umirtu.en: and with that I have been commanded

wa_ana_min_muslimeen.en: and I am of the Muslims

wa_la_ad_dallin.en: and not of those who went astray

wa_lakal_hamd.en: and to You belongs all praise

wa_ala_ibad_salihin.en: and upon the righteous servants of Allah

la_ilaha_illallah.en: there is no deity except Allah

wa_ala_ali_muh.en: and upon the family of Muhammad

wa_ala_ali_ib.en: and upon the family of Ibrahim

innaka_hamid_majid.en: Indeed, You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious

ma_qaddamtu.en: what I have sent ahead (past sins)

wa_ma_akhkhartu.en: and what I have left behind (future)

wa_ma_a_lantu.en: and what I have declared openly

wa_ma_anta_a_lam.tr: wa mā Anta a'lamu bihi minnī
wa_ma_anta_a_lam.en: and what You know better than I do

antal_muqaddim.en: You are the One who brings forward

wa_antal_muakhkhir.en: and You are the One who delays

la_ilaha_illa_ant.en: there is no deity except You

lam_yakun_kufuwan.tr: wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan aḥad
lam_yakun_kufuwan.en: and there is none equal to Him

bi_rabbil_falaq.en: in the Lord of the daybreak

min_sharri_ma_khalaq.en: from the evil of what He created

wa_min_ghasiq.tr: wa min sharri ghāsiqin idhā waqab
wa_min_ghasiq.en: and from the evil of darkness when it settles

wa_min_naffathat.en: and from the evil of those who blow on knots

wa_min_hasid.tr: wa min sharri ḥāsidin idhā ḥasad
wa_min_hasid.en: and from the evil of an envier when he envies

min_waswas_khannas.en: from the evil of the retreating whisperer

minal_jinnati_wan_nas.en: from among the jinn and mankind

wa_tawasaw_haqq.en: and advise one another to truth

wa_tawasaw_sabr.en: and advise one another to patience

inna_shania_abtar.en: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off

sections.title: The Opening — Takbeer & Sana

complete_dua.ar: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ ، سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ ، وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
complete_dua.en: Allah is the Greatest. Glory be to You, O Allah, and with Your praise; and blessed is Your name, and high is Your majesty, and there is no deity other than You.
complete_dua.ml: അല്ലാഹു ഏറ്റവും വലിയവൻ. അല്ലാഹുവേ, നിന്നോടൊപ്പം നിനക്ക് സ്തുതി. നിന്റെ നാമം അനുഗ്രഹീതവും മഹത്വം ഉന്നതവുമാണ്. നിന്നെ അല്ലാതെ ആരാധ്യൻ ഇല്ല.

notes: Say Allāhu Akbar aloud — this Takbeer opens the prayer.
The 'h' in Allāhu comes from deep in the throat — not a soft English 'h'.
Do not stretch the 'ba' in Akbar — keep it short and crisp.
The Sana (Thana) is recited silently after Takbeer, in the first rak'ah only.

sections.title: Alternative Opening — Wajjahtu (Extended)

complete_dua.ar: وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ حَنِيفًا وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ ، إِنَّ صَلَاتِي وَنُسُكِي وَمَحْيَايَ وَمَمَاتِي لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ ، لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ ، وَبِذَلِكَ أُمِرْتُ وَأَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
complete_dua.en: I have directed my face to the One who created the heavens and the earth, inclining to truth, and I am not of the polytheists. Indeed my prayer, my worship, my living and my dying are all for Allah, Lord of the worlds — He has no partner. With this I am commanded, and I am of the Muslims.
complete_dua.ml: ഞാൻ ആകാശ ഭൂമി സൃഷ്ടിച്ചവനിലേക്ക് നേരായ നിലയിൽ മുഖം തിരിക്കുന്നു. ഞാൻ ബഹുദൈവ വിശ്വാസികളിൽ പെട്ടവനല്ല. എന്റെ നമസ്കാരവും ജീവിതവും മരണവും ലോകങ്ങളുടെ രക്ഷിതാവ് അല്ലാഹുവിനാകുന്നു.

notes: This is an alternative, longer opening du'a. Most commonly the shorter Sana is used.
Ḥanīfan — the 'ḥ' is a strong throat sound, not soft like English 'h'.
Recited silently after Takbeer-ul-Ihram.

sections.title: Surah Al-Fatihah — The Opening Chapter (1)

complete_dua.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ ۝ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ ۝ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ ۝ مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ ۝ إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ ۝ اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ ۝ صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
complete_dua.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. All praise is for Allah, Lord of all the worlds, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful, Master of the Day of Judgment. You alone we worship, and from You alone we seek help. Guide us to the straight path — the path of those You have blessed, not of those who earned anger, nor of those who went astray.
complete_dua.ml: അല്ലാഹുവിന്റെ നാമത്തിൽ, പരമകാരുണികനും കരുണാനിധിയുമായ. സർവ്വ സ്തുതിയും ലോകങ്ങളുടെ രക്ഷിതാവ് അല്ലാഹുവിനാകുന്നു. നിന്നെ മാത്രം ഞങ്ങൾ ആരാധിക്കുന്നു, നിന്നോട് മാത്രം സഹായം തേടുന്നു. നേർവഴിയിൽ നയിക്കേണമേ.

notes: Al-Fatihah is recited in every rak'ah — it is a pillar of Salah.
The 'ḍ' in الضَّالِّينَ is a unique heavy sound — practice it carefully.
Stretch long vowels (ā sounds) for 2 counts: Raḥmāān, Raḥīīm, Māāliki.
Say Āmeen quietly (Hanafi) or aloud (Shafi'i/Hanbali) after finishing.
In Fajr, Maghrib, and Isha, the Imam recites aloud — listen and follow.

sections.title: Ruku (Bowing) & Standing Up

complete_dua.ar: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ (×3) ← سَمِعَ اللَّهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ → رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ
complete_dua.en: Glory be to my Lord, the Most Great. (×3) — Allah hears those who praise Him. → Our Lord, and to You belongs all praise.
complete_dua.ml: മഹാനായ എന്റെ രക്ഷിതാവിന് സ്തുതി. (3 തവണ) — അല്ലാഹു സ്തുതിക്കുന്നവരെ കേൾക്കുന്നു. → ഞങ്ങളുടെ രക്ഷിതാവേ, സർവ്വ സ്തുതി നിനക്ക്.

notes: Recite سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ a minimum of 3 times while bowing.
Your back should be flat like a table in Ruku.
The Imam says Sami'a Allāhu aloud; you respond silently with Rabbanā wa lakal-ḥamd.

sections.title: Extended Praise After Ruku — Mil'as-samawati

complete_dua.ar: رَبَّنَا لَكَ الْحَمْدُ مِلْءَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمِلْءَ الْأَرْضِ وَمِلْءَ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ بَعْدُ
complete_dua.en: Our Lord, to You belongs all praise, filling the heavens, filling the earth, and filling whatever else You will.
complete_dua.ml: ഞങ്ങളുടെ രക്ഷിതാവേ, ആകാശങ്ങൾ നിറഞ്ഞ, ഭൂമി നിറഞ്ഞ, നീ ഇഛിക്കുന്നത് നിറഞ്ഞ സ്തുതി നിനക്കാണ്.

notes: Recited silently while standing straight after Ruku (I'tidal).
This is a Sunnah du'a — a beautiful addition after rising from Ruku.

sections.title: Sujood — Prostration

complete_dua.en: Glory be to my Lord, the Most High. (×3)

notes: Recite at least 3 times. The Sujood is the closest you are to Allah — make du'a here!
Seven body parts must touch the floor: forehead+nose, both palms, both knees, both feet.
Stretch the final 'ā' in A'lā — al-A'lāā (2 counts).

sections.title: Sitting Between Two Sujoods — Rabbighfir li

complete_dua.ar: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي ، وَارْحَمْنِي ، وَاهْدِنِي ، وَاجْبُرْنِي ، وَعَافِنِي ، وَارْزُقْنِي ، وَارْفَعْنِي
complete_dua.en: O my Lord, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, mend me, grant me well-being, provide for me, and elevate me.
complete_dua.ml: എന്റെ രക്ഷിതാവേ, പൊറുത്തുതരേണമേ, കരുണ കാണിക്കേണമേ, നേർവഴിയിലാക്കേണമേ, കുറവുകൾ പരിഹരിക്കേണമേ, ആരോഗ്യം നൽകേണമേ, ഉപജീവനം നൽകേണമേ, ഉയർത്തേണമേ.

notes: Recited while sitting between the two prostrations.
Each phrase is a complete du'a — think of the meaning as you say it.

sections.title: Tashahhud — Attahiyyat (The Sitting)

complete_dua.ar: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
complete_dua.en: All greetings, prayers, and pure words are for Allah. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings. Peace be upon us and upon all the righteous servants of Allah. I bear witness that there is no deity except Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.
complete_dua.ml: എല്ലാ അഭിവാദനങ്ങളും പ്രാർത്ഥനകളും നല്ല കാര്യങ്ങളും അല്ലാഹുവിനുള്ളതാണ്. ഓ പ്രവാചകരേ, നിങ്ങൾക്ക് അല്ലാഹുവിന്റെ കരുണ ഉണ്ടാകട്ടെ. ഞങ്ങൾക്കും സജ്ജനങ്ങൾക്കും സലാം.

notes: Raise your right index finger slightly when saying لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ.
Recited in every sitting — after the 2nd rak'ah and the final rak'ah.
Memorise this one early — it appears in every single prayer.

complete_dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ ، اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
complete_dua.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You sent blessings upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim — indeed You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim — indeed You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious.
complete_dua.ml: അല്ലാഹുവേ, ഇബ്‌റാഹിം നബിക്കും കുടുംബത്തിനും ചൊരിഞ്ഞ അനുഗ്രഹം മുഹമ്മദ് നബിക്കും കുടുംബത്തിനും ചൊരിയേണമേ. തീർച്ചയായും നീ സ്തുത്യർഹനും മഹത്വമുള്ളവനുമാണ്.

sections.title: Dua Before Tasleem — Allahummaghfirli

complete_dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ وَمَا أَسْرَفْتُ وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي ، أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ وَأَنْتَ الْمُؤَخِّرُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
complete_dua.en: O Allah, forgive me for what I have sent ahead, what I have left behind, what I have hidden, what I have declared openly, where I have exceeded, and what You know better than I do. You are the One who brings forward and the One who delays. There is no deity except You.
complete_dua.ml: അല്ലാഹുവേ, ഞാൻ ചെയ്ത പഴയ, ഭാവി, രഹസ്യ, പരസ്യ, അതിരുകടന്ന, നിനക്ക് അറിയുന്ന എല്ലാ പാപങ്ങളും പൊറുത്തുതരേണമേ. നിന്നെ അല്ലാതെ ആരാധ്യനില്ല.

notes: This comprehensive du'a covers all categories of sins — past, future, hidden, public, excess.
Recited in the final sitting before turning for Tasleem.

sections.title: Tasleem — The Conclusion

complete_dua.en: Peace be upon you and the mercy of Allah. (Turn right, then left.)
complete_dua.ml: നിങ്ങൾക്ക് അല്ലാഹുവിന്റെ സലാമും കാരുണ്യവും ഉണ്ടാകട്ടെ. (വലത്, ഇടത്)

notes: Turn your head to the right first, then to the left — this ends the prayer.
Congratulations — you have completed a rak'ah! 🌟

sections.title: Surah Al-Ikhlas — Pure Sincerity (112)

complete_dua.ar: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
complete_dua.en: Say: He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor was He begotten, and there is none equal to Him.
complete_dua.ml: പറയുക: അവൻ അല്ലാഹുവാകുന്നു, ഏകൻ. ആശ്രയമായിട്ടുള്ളവൻ. ജന്മം നൽകിയില്ല, ജന്മം നൽകപ്പെട്ടിട്ടുമില്ല, അവന് തുല്യൻ ആരുമില്ല.

notes: Reciting this Surah once equals 1/3 of the Quran in reward. Recite 3× for the full Quran's reward!
Aṣ-Ṣamad — Allah needs nobody; everything needs Him.

complete_dua.ar: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ۝ وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ۝ وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ۝ وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
complete_dua.en: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of what He created, and from the evil of darkness when it settles, and from the evil of those who blow on knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies.
complete_dua.ml: പറയുക: ഞാൻ പുലരിയുടെ രക്ഷിതാവിനോട് അഭയം തേടുന്നു, അവൻ സൃഷ്ടിച്ചതിന്റെ തിന്മയിൽ നിന്നും, കൂരിരുട്ടിൽ നിന്നും, കെട്ടുകളിൽ ഊതുന്നവരിൽ നിന്നും, അസൂയക്കാരന്റെ ദ്രോഹത്തിൽ നിന്നും.

complete_dua.ar: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ۝ إِلَهِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ۝ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ۝ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
complete_dua.en: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the Sovereign of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer who whispers into the hearts of mankind — from among the jinn and mankind.
complete_dua.ml: പറയുക: മനുഷ്യരുടെ രക്ഷിതാവ്, രാജാവ്, ആരാധ്യനോട് ഞാൻ അഭയം തേടുന്നു — ദുർബോധനം ചെയ്ത് പിൻവലിയുന്ന ശൈത്വാൻ്റെ തിന്മയിൽ നിന്ന്.

sections.title: Surah Al-Asr — The Time (103)

complete_dua.ar: وَالْعَصْرِ ۝ إِنَّ الْإِنْسَانَ لَفِي خُسْرٍ ۝ إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالصَّبْرِ
complete_dua.en: By Time! Indeed mankind is in loss — except those who believe, do righteous deeds, and advise one another to truth and to patience.
complete_dua.ml: കാലം സത്യം! മനുഷ്യൻ നഷ്ടത്തിലാണ് — വിശ്വസിക്കുകയും സൽകർമ്മം ചെയ്യുകയും സത്യവും ക്ഷമയും കൊണ്ട് ഉപദേശിക്കുകയും ചെയ്തവർ ഒഴികെ.

notes: Imam Ash-Shafi'i said: if people pondered this Surah alone, it would suffice them.
Four qualities of the successful believer — in three short verses.

sections.title: Surah Al-Kawtar — Abundance (108)

complete_dua.ar: إِنَّا أَعْطَيْنَاكَ الْكَوْثَرَ ۝ فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَانْحَرْ ۝ إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ الْأَبْتَرُ
complete_dua.en: Indeed, We have granted you Al-Kawthar. So pray to your Lord and sacrifice. Indeed, your enemy is the one who is cut off.
complete_dua.ml: തീർച്ചയായും നാം നിനക്ക് കൗഥർ നൽകിയിരിക്കുന്നു. നിന്റെ രക്ഷിതാവിനായി നമസ്കരിക്കുക, ബലി അർപ്പിക്കുക. നിന്നോടു ദ്വേഷ്യം വെക്കുന്നവൻ തന്നെ ഭാവിയില്ലാത്തവൻ.

notes: Shortest Surah in the Quran — only 3 verses.
Al-Kawthar is a river in Jannah granted to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.
